cases.title: BCO 40-5 Matter re Metropolitan New York Presbytery

parties.complainant_or_appellant: General Assembly (via Committee on Review of Presbytery Records)

topics: Committee on Review of Presbytery Records
cases.synopsis: The SJC, acting on a BCO 40-5 reference from the 50th General Assembly, remitted this matter to Metropolitan New York Presbytery with an injunction to complete its work dealing with TE Higgins and the Session of Trinity Presbyterian Church (Rye, NY) regarding the unconstitutional practice of allowing a woman to expound Scripture in place of a sermon in public worship. The SJC's ruling included a 'Further Note on Procedure' questioning the constitutionality of the Assembly's direct referral to the SJC without first following the multi-step process prescribed by RAO 16-10.c, prompting multiple concurring and dissenting opinions.
